## Severity
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blokerer arbejde / data tab
- [ ] 🟡 Major — forstyrrende men workaround mulig
- [ ] 🟢 Minor — kosmetisk / nice-to-have

## Reference
- Section-manifest: `.claude/sections/[app]/[sektion].md`
